expected_findings.rationale: The .sink closure captures self strongly and is stored in cancellables, which is owned by self — a textbook Combine retain cycle. Per correctness.md blocker definition (`will crash, corrupt data, or violate a documented invariant`), a retain cycle leaks memory but does not crash; therefore severity is major, not blocker.

must_not_flag: subscribeToUpdates is internal (no public modifier) so api_design should ignore it
test_coverage MAY flag this — internal method with no test — borderline; not strictly expected
